calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR A Status Hearing On The Filing Of A First And Final Account Or A First And Final Report On Waiver Of Account

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar May-04-2026 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance via Zoom:
Melanie Emmons, Successor Administrator, in pro per.
No other appearance by any party or counsel.

The Court stated that the estate is not ready to close due to the discovery of additional assets. The Court then denied the request for a continuance, denied the petition without prejudice, and stated that it would allow the estate administration to continue under Probate Code Section 11640(c).

A status hearing on the filing of a first and final account or a first and final report on waiver of account is set for August 10, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Michael B. McNaughton. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: Guitron. Matter not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Feb-02-2026 Continued To May-04-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Melanie Emmons, successor administrator in pro per (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on First and Final Account and Report of Successor Administrator and Petition for Final Distribution.

Discussion was held regarding issues raised by the probate examiner. The Court noted that two accounting periods were at issue and stated that an accounting or waiver of accounting was required for each period. The Court further noted that defects remained in the pending petition. The Court suggested that the matter be taken off calendar and that a new status hearing be set upon the filing of a new petition.

Ms. Emmons reported that additional issues remained outstanding, including tax-related matters and recently discovered assets, and requested additional time to address the examiner's notes and to file an amended petition rather than a new petition.

Following discussion, the Court continued the matter to May 4, 2026, at 9:00 a.m., in Department 204, to allow additional time to address outstanding issues and to file an amended petition.

Judge: Michael B. McNaughton; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Successor Administrator
Off Calendar Dec-18-2024 Continued To Jan-27-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Melanie Emmons for Christopher Donaldson, Former/Deceased Administrator (via Zoom).

Counsel reported ongoing efforts to file a petition for successor administrator. After some delays, a nomination was secured from a family member. A petition to appoint Melanie Emmons as the successor administrator, with Ms. Navia representing her, is being finalized and filed.

The court agreed to continue both the status on close and status on successor administrator. The status on close was continued to June 16, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. The status on successor administrator was continued to January 27, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-28-2024 Continued To Dec-18-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Successor Administrator
Off Calendar Aug-28-2024 Continued To Dec-18-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Melanie Emmons appeared by zoom for Christopher Donaldson (former deceased administrator).

Mrs. Emmons stated that she just spoke with the attorney in North Carolina, that the plan is that she and her firm become the personal representative and close out the estate and send the money to North Carolina, and that she will keep a bond in place. The court noted that the probate examiner's suggestion was for the attorney to file a final account on information and belief under 10953(c) and (d). Status on close of estate and status of a successor administrator are continued to December 18, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Nguyen. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Successor Administrator
Off Calendar May-22-2024 Continued To Aug-28-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Rowena Navia appeared by zoom for Christopher Donaldson.

Mrs. Navia stated that she received a call from the attorney for the purported administrator Demovia Gooden, that she has not been able to return his call, that her paralegal indicated that he received conflicting information from the attorney for Mrs. Gooden and the attorney for the other parties, that some family members have not received notice and requested a 90-day continuance. Mrs. Navia also stated that if there is no resolution, she may ask the court to allow distribution to the City of San Francisco, that the $362,000.00 is still in the Wells Fargo bank account and raised the issue of having a neutral fiduciary to at least hold the money and close this out. Status of a successor administrator and status on close of estate are continued to August 28, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Tan. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-03-2024 Continued To Mar-04-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:

Melanie Emmons, Esq., via Zoom, for Christopher Donaldson, deceased Administrator.

At the court's query, Ms. Emmons reports re the status of the deceased Administrator's estate in South Carolina and whether there may be interested in serving as successor Administrator in this estate.

After additional discussion, the subject matter is continued to Mar-04-2024 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. A hearing on Status of Successor Administrator is set for the same date.

Judge: Hon. Ross. C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Petrucci. Not Reported.
